testcase.name: test_conflict_buy_sell_reduces_confidence

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 0.89 < 0.89 + where 0.89 = DecisionResult(action='sell', confidence=0.89, sentiment='bearish', rationale='[HYBRID_ENABLED=False] test', source='llm_only', model_prob_up=None, model_confidence=None, llm_action=None, llm_confidence=None, ensemble_score=None, entry_zone=None, invalidation_zone=None, region_type=None, conflict_detected=False, llm_is_fallback=False).confidence
